meta.correction_note: REPLACES sentinel outcome from prior commit. Previous version had 0.0 sentinel values because Hyperliquid API was queried with wrong timestamps (2025 vs 2026 epoch). Corrected timestamps produced 9 real HYPE candles.
meta.t0_alignment_rule: open price of nearest 15m candle starting at or before target time
meta.t1_alignment_rule: open price of nearest 15m candle starting at or before target time

historical_materiality.note: HYPE historical volatility baseline not established. No 30-day or longer volatility history available through public API. Cannot determine whether 1.13% move exceeds expected volatility for this asset.

event_time_uncertainty.note: Only broadcast_time is known. The actual whale position change may have occurred hours before the broadcast. Estimated uncertainty is conservatively set to 1 hour.

price_precision.precision_note: 15m candle interval. t0 used 13:00 open (closest candle before t0=13:02, 120s lag). t1 used 14:00 open (closest candle before t0+1h=14:02, 120s lag). BTC prices from Binance 1m klines had 0s lag.
